case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. BRAZIL MCGEE et al

docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MCGEE, BRAZIL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-08-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). OSC TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY RAYMOND A. PATENAUDE. THE MAR-29-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCGEE, BRAZIL $2,688.33 PRINCIPAL, $560.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $286.76 INTEREST, $161.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,696.09, TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $3696.09, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-08-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE
